description_long: This is an adult male figure with a youthful appearance, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a casual short-sleeve V-neck shirt with trim at the collar and sleeves, paired with knee-length shorts. His footwear consists of low-top sneakers with visible laces. The figure has a short, styled haircut and a clean-shaven face. The overall build is athletic and proportionate, with defined limbs and a relaxed posture. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, urban casual style suitable for everyday street environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a short haircut, wearing a V-neck shirt, knee-length shorts, and sneakers, standing in a T-pose. The figure has an athletic build and a modern urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, V-neck shirt, shorts, and sneakers with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the shirt and shorts, and the sneaker's side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, shorts, and sneakers, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, the side of the shirt and shorts, and the sneaker's side details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve V-neck shirt and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
